project_profile.identity: TypeScript-first Codex operating memory, eval, and control-plane product.
project_profile.product_boundary: Local Codex-first runtime spine; no dashboard/API/MCP implementation before typed reports exist.

planned_runtime_dirs.purpose: Dry-run init manifests and local bootstrap runtime reports.

bootstrap_plan.purpose: Create or preserve a thin Codex selector that points to active goal, memory index, and verification rules.
bootstrap_plan.boundary: AGENTS.md must stay a compact router, not a generated encyclopedia or memory database.

bootstrap_plan.purpose: Describe local-first KRN project settings without requiring cloud/API sync.
bootstrap_plan.boundary: Config may point at stores and policies; it must not embed live memory records or current-goal truth.

bootstrap_plan.purpose: Point Codex/KRN at source graph entries used for source-backed planning and stale/conflict checks.
bootstrap_plan.boundary: Source pointers are indexes and lineage, not a copied bibliography or hardcoded active source list.

bootstrap_plan.purpose: Prepare the runtime directory for bounded context packets built from task intent, memory selection, and source refs.
bootstrap_plan.boundary: Context packets may record selected IDs and guidance; they must not store authoritative memory bodies.

bootstrap_plan.purpose: Prepare a local eval baseline that uses the lean core/current path before explicit lab work.
bootstrap_plan.boundary: Green evals are regression evidence only; lab, benchmark, and dashboard checks stay explicit.

bootstrap_plan.purpose: Reserve a bounded repo-local skill folder with owner, trigger, forbidden behavior, verification, and deletion criteria.
bootstrap_plan.boundary: Skill wiring writes a seed index only; it must not create active skills, copy skill bodies, store memory bodies, or claim skill quality.

bootstrap_plan.purpose: Prepare local policy hooks and approval boundaries for unsafe writes, memory writes, source acceptance, and command use.
bootstrap_plan.boundary: Policies can warn/block/propose; broad write-capable API or cloud sync requires later explicit audit/idempotency work.

interpretation_caveat: This manifest proves dry-run bootstrap contract shape only; it does not prove productivity lift, write-mode safety, memory-core quality, MCP readiness, dashboard readiness, or paper-research automation.
